title: Korak 12

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def pin_extractor(poem):
    secret_code = ''
    lines = poem.split('\n')
    for line_index, line in enumerate(lines):
        print(line_index, line)
        words = line.split()
        print(str(len(words[line_index])))
        secret_code += str(len(words[line_index]))
    


poem = """Stars and the moon
shine in the sky
white and bright
until the end of the night"""

pin_extractor(poem)

tests.text: The pin_extractor function should return secret_code at the end.

description: Uklonite dva poziva print i dodajte izjavu return koja vraća secret_code na poslednju liniju u funkciji.
